queries.title: Get project
queries.hint: Single project by projectId + chain.
queries.query: query($projectId: Float!, $chainId: Float!) { project(version: 6, projectId: $projectId, chainId: $chainId) { projectId chainId version name handle owner balance volume volumeUsd tokenSupply paymentsCount contributorsCount suckerGroupId createdAt } }

queries.title: List projects
queries.hint: Browse projects across one or more chains, sorted by volume USD.
queries.query: query($chainIds: [Int!], $version: Int, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { projects(where: { chainId_in: $chainIds, version: $version }, orderBy: "volumeUsd", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { projectId chainId version name handle owner volumeUsd balance paymentsCount contributorsCount } totalCount } }

queries.title: Trending projects
queries.hint: Top projects by 7-day trending score (across selected chains).
queries.query: query($chainIds: [Int!], $version: Int, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { projects(where: { chainId_in: $chainIds, version: $version }, orderBy: "trendingScore", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { projectId chainId version name handle trendingScore trendingVolume trendingPaymentsCount } totalCount } }

queries.title: Projects by owner
queries.hint: All projects owned by a given address.
queries.query: query($owner: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { projects(where: { version: 6, owner: $owner }, orderBy: "createdAt", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { projectId chainId version name handle volumeUsd balance createdAt } totalCount } }

queries.title: Project history (snapshots)
queries.hint: Point-in-time snapshots of project volume + balance across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($projectId: Int!, $chainId: Int!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { projectMoments(where: { version: 6, projectId: $projectId, chainId: $chainId }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId block timestamp volume volumeUsd balance trendingScore } totalCount } }

queries.title: Cash-out tax history
queries.hint: Historical cash-out tax (basis points) per ruleset, across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { cashOutTaxSnapshots(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "start", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId start duration rulesetId cashOutTax } totalCount } }

queries.title: Get sucker group
queries.hint: Pick any project on any of its chains — aggregated cross-chain totals + per-chain breakdown.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!) { suckerGroup(id: $suckerGroupId) { id volume volumeUsd balance tokenSupply paymentsCount contributorsCount projects { items { projectId chainId name balance volume } } } }

queries.title: Sucker group snapshots
queries.hint: Pick any project on any of its chains — historical cross-chain aggregated state.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { suckerGroupMoments(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { timestamp volume volumeUsd balance tokenSupply } totalCount } }

queries.title: Sucker bridge transactions
queries.hint: Pick any project on any of its chains — cross-chain token bridging via suckers.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { suckerTransactions(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId }, orderBy: "createdAt", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { index chainId peerChainId beneficiary projectTokenCount terminalTokenAmount status createdAt } totalCount } }

queries.title: Pending sucker transactions
queries.hint: Bridges that haven't completed yet.
queries.query: query($limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { suckerTransactions(where: { version: 6, status: pending }, orderBy: "createdAt", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { index chainId peerChainId beneficiary projectTokenCount terminalTokenAmount status createdAt suckerGroupId } totalCount } }

queries.title: Get participant
queries.hint: Token holder balance for a single project + address.
queries.query: query($projectId: Float!, $chainId: Float!, $address: String!) { participant(version: 6, projectId: $projectId, chainId: $chainId, address: $address) { address balance creditBalance erc20Balance volume volumeUsd paymentsCount lastPaidTimestamp } }

queries.title: Top token holders
queries.hint: Holders of a project's token, ordered by balance.
queries.query: query($projectId: Int!, $chainId: Int, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { participants(where: { version: 6, projectId: $projectId, chainId: $chainId }, orderBy: "balance", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { address balance creditBalance erc20Balance volume paymentsCount lastPaidTimestamp } totalCount } }

queries.title: Top contributors
queries.hint: Participants ordered by lifetime volume paid in.
queries.query: query($projectId: Int!, $chainId: Int, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { participants(where: { version: 6, projectId: $projectId, chainId: $chainId }, orderBy: "volume", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { address volume volumeUsd balance paymentsCount lastPaidTimestamp } totalCount } }

queries.title: Participant balance history
queries.hint: Historical snapshots of a holder's balance across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $address: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { participantSnapshots(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds, address: $address }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId block timestamp balance creditBalance erc20Balance volume volumeUsd } totalCount } }

queries.title: Wallet portfolio
queries.hint: Cross-project aggregate stats for a wallet.
queries.query: query($address: String!) { wallet(address: $address) { address volume volumeUsd lastPaidTimestamp } }

queries.title: Wallet's project participations
queries.hint: Every project + chain this address holds tokens in.
queries.query: query($address: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { participants(where: { version: 6, address: $address }, orderBy: "balance", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { projectId chainId balance creditBalance erc20Balance volume paymentsCount } totalCount } }

queries.title: Wallet's NFTs
queries.hint: All Juicebox 721 NFTs owned by this address.
queries.query: query($owner: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { nfts(where: { version: 6, owner: $owner }, orderBy: "createdAt", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { tokenId projectId chainId tierId category createdAt tokenUri } totalCount } }

queries.title: Project activity feed
queries.hint: All events for a project across the sucker group (pay, cash-out, mint, payout, loan…).
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { activityEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { id chainId timestamp txHash from type payEvent { amount amountUsd beneficiary memo } cashOutTokensEvent { cashOutCount reclaimAmount holder } mintNftEvent { tierId tokenId } sendPayoutsEvent { amount amountPaidOut fee } borrowLoanEvent { borrowAmount collateral } repayLoanEvent { repayBorrowAmount collateralCountToReturn } } totalCount } }

queries.title: Omnichain activity feed
queries.hint: Pick any project on any of its chains — events across the sucker group, optionally narrowed to selected chains.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { activityEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { timestamp chainId type txHash from payEvent { amount memo } cashOutTokensEvent { cashOutCount reclaimAmount } } totalCount } }

queries.title: Wallet activity feed
queries.hint: All events initiated by a specific address.
queries.query: query($from: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { activityEvents(where: { version: 6, from: $from }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { timestamp chainId projectId type txHash payEvent { amount memo } cashOutTokensEvent { cashOutCount reclaimAmount } } totalCount } }

queries.title: Recent payments
queries.hint: Payments for a project across the sucker group, newest first.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { payEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash from beneficiary amount amountUsd memo newlyIssuedTokenCount } totalCount } }

queries.title: Payments by payer
queries.hint: All payments made by an address (across projects).
queries.query: query($from: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { payEvents(where: { version: 6, from: $from }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { timestamp chainId projectId beneficiary amount amountUsd memo txHash } totalCount } }

queries.title: Payments by beneficiary
queries.hint: All payments routed to a specific beneficiary.
queries.query: query($beneficiary: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { payEvents(where: { version: 6, beneficiary: $beneficiary }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { timestamp chainId projectId from amount amountUsd memo txHash } totalCount } }

queries.title: Recent cash-outs
queries.hint: Tokens burned for treasury reclaim, across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { cashOutTokensEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash holder beneficiary cashOutCount reclaimAmount reclaimAmountUsd } totalCount } }

queries.title: Cash-outs by holder
queries.hint: All cash-outs by a specific token holder.
queries.query: query($holder: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { cashOutTokensEvents(where: { version: 6, holder: $holder }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { timestamp chainId projectId beneficiary cashOutCount reclaimAmount reclaimAmountUsd txHash } totalCount } }

queries.title: Add-to-balance events
queries.hint: Direct ETH/USDC additions (no token mint), across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { addToBalanceEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash from caller amount memo returnedFees } totalCount } }

queries.title: Allowance usage
queries.hint: When the project owner pulls funds from surplus allowance, across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { useAllowanceEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash caller beneficiary amount netAmountPaidOut rulesetCycleNumber } totalCount } }

queries.title: Mint events (payment-driven)
queries.hint: Token mints triggered by payments, across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { mintTokensEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash beneficiary beneficiaryTokenCount reservedPercent tokenCount memo } totalCount } }

queries.title: Manual mint events
queries.hint: Owner-triggered token mints (not from payments), across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { manualMintTokensEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash caller beneficiary tokenCount memo } totalCount } }

queries.title: Auto-issue events (revnet)
queries.hint: Tokens auto-issued at revnet stage transitions.
queries.query: query($projectId: Int!, $chainId: Int!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { autoIssueEvents(where: { version: 6, projectId: $projectId, chainId: $chainId }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { timestamp txHash caller beneficiary stageId count } totalCount } }

queries.title: Auto-issuance configs
queries.hint: Stored auto-issuance amounts per revnet stage.
queries.query: query($projectId: Int!, $chainId: Int!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { storeAutoIssuanceAmountEvents(where: { version: 6, projectId: $projectId, chainId: $chainId }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { timestamp txHash caller beneficiary stageId count } totalCount } }

queries.title: Burn events
queries.hint: Tokens burned (cash-out driven), across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { burnEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash from amount creditAmount erc20Amount } totalCount } }

queries.title: Manual burn events
queries.hint: Owner-triggered burns, across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { manualBurnEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash from amount creditAmount erc20Amount } totalCount } }

queries.title: ERC20 deployments (per project)
queries.hint: When a project deployed its ERC20, across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { deployErc20Events(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash symbol name token caller } totalCount } }

queries.title: Send-payouts events
queries.hint: When a project distributed payouts (any caller), across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { sendPayoutsEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash caller rulesetCycleNumber amount amountPaidOut fee netLeftoverPayoutAmount } totalCount } }

queries.title: Per-split payouts
queries.hint: Individual split payouts (one row per split recipient), across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { sendPayoutToSplitEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash beneficiary splitProjectId amount netAmount percent rulesetId hook } totalCount } }

queries.title: Reserved-token batch sends
queries.hint: Batch distribution of reserved tokens, across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { sendReservedTokensToSplitsEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash owner tokenCount leftoverAmount rulesetCycleNumber } totalCount } }

queries.title: Reserved-token per-split sends
queries.hint: Individual reserved-token splits (one row per recipient), across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { sendReservedTokensToSplitEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash beneficiary splitProjectId tokenCount percent rulesetId hook } totalCount } }

queries.title: Active loans (project)
queries.hint: All active loans against a revnet.
queries.query: query($projectId: Int!, $chainId: Int!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { loans(where: { version: 6, projectId: $projectId, chainId: $chainId }, orderBy: "createdAt", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { id borrowAmount collateral prepaidDuration prepaidFeePercent owner beneficiary createdAt } totalCount } }

queries.title: Loans by wallet
queries.hint: Active loans owned by an address.
queries.query: query($owner: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { loans(where: { version: 6, owner: $owner }, orderBy: "createdAt", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { id projectId chainId borrowAmount collateral prepaidDuration beneficiary createdAt } totalCount } }

queries.title: Get loan by ID
queries.hint: Single loan by its NFT token ID.
queries.query: query($id: BigInt!, $chainId: Float!) { loan(version: 6, chainId: $chainId, id: $id) { id projectId chainId borrowAmount collateral sourceFeeAmount prepaidDuration prepaidFeePercent beneficiary owner token terminal tokenUri createdAt } }

queries.title: Borrow events
queries.hint: Loan creations across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { borrowLoanEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash borrowAmount collateral prepaidDuration beneficiary } totalCount } }

queries.title: Repay events
queries.hint: Loan repayments across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { repayLoanEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash loanId paidOffLoanId repayBorrowAmount collateralCountToReturn } totalCount } }

queries.title: Reallocate events
queries.hint: Collateral moved between loans, across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { reallocateLoanEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash loanId reallocatedLoanId removedCollateralCount } totalCount } }

queries.title: Liquidations
queries.hint: Loans liquidated for non-payment, across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { liquidateLoanEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash borrowAmount collateral caller } totalCount } }

queries.title: NFT tiers for project
queries.hint: Tier configuration: price, supply, metadata.
queries.query: query($projectId: Int!, $chainId: Int!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { nftTiers(where: { version: 6, projectId: $projectId, chainId: $chainId }, orderBy: "tierId", orderDirection: "asc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { tierId price initialSupply remainingSupply category votingUnits allowOwnerMint cannotBeRemoved resolvedUri svg } totalCount } }

queries.title: NFT mints
queries.hint: NFT mint events across the sucker group.
queries.query: query($suckerGroupId: String!, $chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { mintNftEvents(where: { version: 6, suckerGroupId: $suckerGroupId, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { chainId timestamp txHash beneficiary tierId tokenId totalAmountPaid hook } totalCount } }

queries.title: NFTs in project
queries.hint: All NFTs in a project (newest first).
queries.query: query($projectId: Int!, $chainId: Int!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { nfts(where: { version: 6, projectId: $projectId, chainId: $chainId }, orderBy: "createdAt", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { tokenId tierId category owner createdAt tokenUri } totalCount } }

queries.title: NFT hooks for project
queries.hint: Deployed 721 hook contracts.
queries.query: query($projectId: Int!, $chainId: Int!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { nftHooks(where: { version: 6, projectId: $projectId, chainId: $chainId }, limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { address name symbol createdAt } totalCount } }

queries.title: Banny decorations
queries.hint: Banny NFT decoration events.
queries.query: query($limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { decorateBannyEvents(orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { timestamp txHash chainId bannyBodyId outfitIds backgroundId tokenUri } totalCount } }

queries.title: Permission holders (by project)
queries.hint: Operators with permissions on this project.
queries.query: query($projectId: Int!, $chainId: Int!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { permissionHolders(where: { version: 6, projectId: $projectId, chainId: $chainId }, limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { account operator permissions isRevnetOperator } totalCount } }

queries.title: Permissions held by account
queries.hint: All projects where an account has granted permissions.
queries.query: query($account: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { permissionHolders(where: { version: 6, account: $account }, limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { projectId chainId operator permissions isRevnetOperator } totalCount } }

queries.title: Recent project creations
queries.hint: Newest projects across one or more chains.
queries.query: query($chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { projectCreateEvents(where: { version: 6, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { timestamp chainId projectId caller txHash project { name handle owner } } totalCount } }

queries.title: Recent ERC20 deployments (global)
queries.hint: Newest project ERC20s across one or more chains.
queries.query: query($chainIds: [Int!], $limit: Int!, $offset: Int!) { deployErc20Events(where: { version: 6, chainId_in: $chainIds }, orderBy: "timestamp", orderDirection: "desc", limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { items { timestamp chainId projectId name symbol token txHash } totalCount } }
